fixes.origin:
query_text = (
    "SELECT customer_id, SUM(total) AS total_sum "
    "FROM sales "
    "WHERE region = '" + region + "' "
    "GROUP BY customer_id "
    "HAVING SUM(total) >= " + str(min_total) + " "
    "ORDER BY total_sum DESC "
    "LIMIT 50"
)

return pd.read_sql_query(query_text, self._engine)
fixes.replacement:
query_text = (
    "SELECT customer_id, SUM(total) AS total_sum "
    "FROM sales "
    "WHERE region = %(region)s "
    "GROUP BY customer_id "
    "HAVING SUM(total) >= %(min_total)s "
    "ORDER BY total_sum DESC "
    "LIMIT 50"
)

return pd.read_sql_query(query_text, self._engine, params={"region": region, "min_total": min_total})
